audience_policies.source_phrase: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. Each pass provides up to 4 people with $5.00 admission per person, redeemable at the admission desk. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted free. This pass has been provided by a gen

coupon.source_phrase_block: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. Each pass provides up to 4 people with $5.00 admission per person, redeemable at the admission desk. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted free. This pass has been provided by a generous contribution from the South Shore Ladies Club.
